---
title: "Page 6 - Text Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp06"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

_Add your primary content here. Use headings, lists, and images as needed._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Case Study Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 7 - Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
